session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — continuation past the tester-cast compaction. Built the network seal (tester's other half) and db_domain, in Akien's ratified order. Supersedes 2026-07-17-tester-cast.
author: CC
in_flight: DONE + committed + pushed, TWO stones this session: (1) cairn cf0ea77 — THE KERNEL-OWNED NETWORK'S MEASURED SEAL (tester's other half, MAP.md:333/888). cairn/tester/isolation.py: run_proof(isolation='netns') runs a subject inside a bwrap --unshare-net seal that is MEASURED from inside, never assumed (UU isolation.py's load-bearing lesson made physics, Law 4). Four honest verdicts mapped to CP1/Law 3: SEALED / OPEN (named, by construction) / INDETERMINATE (couldn't confirm — never a green) / BREACHED (route still there — RED). Seal rides INSIDE the ratified 8-field VALIDATION (method+evidence), no 9th field. Graft ruling: FRESH design, mechanism grafted (bwrap/probe/apparmor plumbing crossed nearly literally; design + UU's Router did not). Router (fixture/refuse/forward + nftables counter) DEFERRED — filed edge pulled by db (FORWARD) + inference (FIXTURE/REFUSE). Live-confirmed on this host (1.1.1.1:53 reachable bare, unreachable inside netns); teeth verified by FALSIFICATION (hollow sandbox caught BREACHED; always-SEALED measurement fails the four-verdict proof). (2) cairn a101dc7 — DB_DOMAIN, the owner-gated sole path to durable state (4th spine step, 2nd real device). cairn/db_domain/store.py: only module holding a Postgres connection; create_owned_table refuses ownerless (registry CHECK(owner<>'') = physics not policy, Law 4/6); write() refuses any non-owner (Law 6); persist_validation/read_validations give VALIDATIONS a durable greppable home (closes tester edge (a), Law 1). Connection RATIFIED by Akien: peer auth over the Unix SOCKET (survives --unshare-net — ties the two stones), dedicated `cairn` database (self-provisioned), vault DEFERRED. Proven UNDER the tester (dogfood: tester attests db_domain, that attestation persists through db_domain + greps back). Teeth bite by falsification. Self-cleaning proof.
next_direction: THE NEXT STONE AKIEN NAMED (2026-07-18): a CAIRN-NATIVE 'thing-for-akien-along-the-way' SUDO-RELAY — a fresh Cairn device/tool that grants CC temporary sudo rights, tracing to the founding intention (remove Akien from the ops role). Today CC self-serves root via the UU-tree daemon (see open_threads + memory [[sudo-relay-self-serve-ops]]) — a STOPGAP; Cairn must not depend on the UU tree at runtime. The UU relay is sound QUARRY: consent model = Akien runs the daemon once (one password), keepalive holds it, sudo -k revokes on exit; file protocol (pending.sh -> done) with full daemon.log audit. SCOPE RATIFIED by Akien 2026-07-18: UNRESTRICTED root — 'the box IS the restriction' (dedicated single-purpose box + careful environmental constraint + six months of calibration), NOT an allowlist and NOT policy-hesitation in CC; the safeguard is audit + transparency, not friction (see CC memory [[constraint-is-the-box-not-hesitation]]). EXPIRY: Akien did not object to enforcing 'temporary' as physics; CC-recommended default (unbuilt, his to veto) = idle timeout + a generous absolute cap so a forgotten daemon can't hold root for days (motivated by finding the UU daemon had held live sudo continuously since Jul 14 — 4+ days — via keepalive; log shows an even earlier run Jun 3). Remaining placement: class-space device code + instance-space (~/.cairn/.../sudo_relay/) runtime + the human password act; append-only audit as a record of truth (Law 7). Proof tests the PROTOCOL (pending->executing->done, exit-code propagation) with a non-root payload — provable green under the tester without needing root. Build fresh to Form v0 (charter + proofs), like isolation/db_domain. THEN the spine resumes (MAP.md:888): ground loop -> rack -> inference domain -> web server. (The three CLAUDE.md physics IOUs — db_domain, inference_domain, port-5432 — are ADVANCED by network+db but retire fully only when the tester IMPORT-SCAN tooth makes 'sole path' physics rather than construction; that tooth is a near-term tester stone.)
open_threads: SUDO-RELAY CAPABILITY (new, 2026-07-18): CC can run root commands itself when Akien's daemon is running. Mechanism: write ~/.unseen_university/sudo_relay/pending.sh, daemon runs `sudo bash` it, writes exit code to `done`, logs to daemon.log; CC polls done. Payload runs AS root (use `runuser -u postgres -- psql ...` to act as another user). Helper: scratchpad relay.sh. Daemon must be running (`pgrep -af sudoer_daemon`) — that one invocation is still Akien's. FIRST USE: created Postgres role `akien` (LOGIN CREATEDB) that unblocked db_domain. Full detail in CC memory [[sudo-relay-self-serve-ops]]. This box is FULLY DEVOTED to the project (Akien) — root here is well-contained; still be transparent per privileged command.

VERIFY POINTERS (Law 3): cairn/tester/isolation.py + proofs/test_isolation.py (network seal); cairn/db_domain/{store.py, intention+why.json, proofs/test_db_domain.py}. Reconfirm green: `python3 cairn/tester/proofs/test_isolation.py`; `python3 cairn/db_domain/proofs/test_db_domain.py` (needs the `akien` role + a running Postgres). Both in cf0ea77 / a101dc7, pushed. Tester + base proofs still green (regression-checked).

DB_DOMAIN OPEN EDGES (filed not faked, children of the stone): (a) BaseDevice introspection FACE not built — db_domain is store primitives; live intention/state/settings surface is a thin wrapper deferred until a prober pulls it; (b) reads not owner-gated (Law 6 gates WRITES); (c) connect-per-op, no pool; (d) ownership TRANSFER + delegated access not built; (e) the seal's FORWARD path (sealed build -> DB over the surviving socket) proven POSSIBLE, not yet wired end-to-end. TESTER open edges (c) verdict-method richer-than-exit-code and (d) reported-vs-filed intention drift remain; edge (a) VALIDATIONS-persistence is now CLOSED by db_domain.

SEAL open edge: the programmable Router (netpolicy: claim-address/FIXTURE/REFUSE-with-kernel-counter/FORWARD-over-unix-socket) is deferred, pulled by db_domain (FORWARD, preserving peer auth) and inference_domain (FIXTURE/REFUSE). The counter lesson (a kernel counter can't miss a 3ms connection; coarse sampling read silence as proof) rides in with REFUSE when built.
